## Rendering And Copy Checks

- All generated files include readiness overview, preview cards, fix plan, patch preview, safe apply, and developer details sections.
- The URL + repo reports include the local-vs-live deployment warning.
- The URL-only report does not show safe-apply write-command messaging.
- No raw `<script` tags were found in the generated HTML output during structural scanning.
- No blocking rendering or copy issues were found in automated review.
- Note: the embedded raw JSON developer details make the files roughly 140-214 KB. That is acceptable for V1, but developer details may be visually long until the interactive GUI exists.

## Manual Review Readiness

The static HTML report is ready for manual visual review.
